chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-302 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 08-09-2025 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Soomro, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Petitioners present along with their counsel and they contend that due to their un-ceremonial marriage, the parents of petitioner No.1 are annoyed and they have declared them as Karo-Kari with intend to commit their murder, therefore, they seek protection of their lives from official respondents. The official respondents No.3 and 4 have submitted their replies wherein they have stated that they will provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. In view of the statement, learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this case. Petition is accordingly disposed of, with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners and ensure that no harm is caused to them on account of their marriage. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
